name: Miracll Chemicals Co.,Ltd
summary: Miracll Chemicals Co.,Ltd, a material science company, researches, develops, manufactures, and sells thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU) elastomers and polyol specialty products. It offers polyester, polyether, and polycaprolactone based TPUs; expandable and expanded, and functional TPUs; and hot melt and solvent-based adhesive TPUs. The company provides its products for use in electronics, sports and leisure, automotive, medical, mechanical, and industrial applications. Miracll Chemicals Co.,Ltd was founded in 2009 and is based in Yantai, China.
